detectors.description:
DefaultSweeper.constructor(address).controller (UserWallet.sol#69) shadows:
	- AbstractSweeper.controller (UserWallet.sol#15) (state variable)

Controller.setOwner(address) (UserWallet.sol#225-229) should emit an event for: 
	- owner = _owner (UserWallet.sol#227) 
	- owner = _owner (UserWallet.sol#227)

Controller.setAuthorizedCaller(address) (UserWallet.sol#209-213) should emit an event for: 
	- authorizedCaller = _newCaller (UserWallet.sol#211) 
	- authorizedCaller = _newCaller (UserWallet.sol#211)

Controller.setOwner(address)._owner (UserWallet.sol#225) lacks a zero-check on :
		- owner = _owner (UserWallet.sol#227)

Controller.setDestination(address)._dest (UserWallet.sol#217) lacks a zero-check on :
		- destination = _dest (UserWallet.sol#219)

Controller.setAuthorizedCaller(address)._newCaller (UserWallet.sol#209) lacks a zero-check on :
		- authorizedCaller = _newCaller (UserWallet.sol#211)

UserWallet.sweepAll(address)._token (UserWallet.sol#129) lacks a zero-check on :
		- sweeperList.sweeperOf(_token).delegatecall(msg.data) (UserWallet.sol#131)
